en_title: Xbox Is ‘Not Healthy’, But Losing All of This Talent Isn’t the Cure
cn_title: XBOX「不健康」，但流失这些人才不是解药
subtitle: 这些团队值得更好
opus_summary: 微软正把XBOX推向一次大规模「重置」，但如果代价是让Arkane、Compulsion、Double Fine、Ninja Theory和Undead Labs等创意团队离开，那么这并不像是在治愈XBOX。

paragraphs.en: Ever since Microsoft鈥檚 near-$70 billion acquisition of Activision Blizzard in 2022 , the wheels have been steadily loosening at Xbox, to the point where it feels like they could fall off completely any day now. From the devolution of Bethesda鈥檚 studios, including the closure of Tango Gameworks and Arkane Austin , to the cancellation of Perfect Dark and the end of The Initiative before it could even ship one game, it鈥檚 been a pretty bleak few years. And now Xbox鈥檚 creative force faces what new Xbox CEO Asha Sharma terms a 鈥渞eset鈥?, seemingly corporate speak for throwing overboard many of the development studios the megacorp has acquired over the years.
paragraphs.cn: 自从微软在2022年以近700亿美元(约合人民币4753亿元)收购动视暴雪以来，XBOX的车轮就一直在松动，甚至让人觉得它随时可能彻底脱落。从贝塞斯达旗下工作室的退化，包括Tango Gameworks和Arkane Austin关闭，到《完美黑暗》取消、The Initiative甚至没来得及推出一款游戏便宣告终结，过去几年都相当惨淡。如今，XBOX的创意力量正面对新任XBOX CEO Asha Sharma所称的「重置」；这听起来像是企业话术，意思是把这家巨型公司多年来收购的许多开发工作室扔下船。

paragraphs.en: The signs haven鈥檛 looked promising for much of the generation, but now, more than ever, it feels like the end of Xbox, with many decisions taken by past leadership being walked back. During his time at the helm, Phil Spencer built a production empire with studios that opened up a multitude of avenues for Xbox to explore 鈥?the business was equipped to make inroads in practically any genre or trend you can think of. But with multiple studios set to be jettisoned from its portfolio and left to fend for themselves, those avenues could soon be demolished.
paragraphs.cn: 这一代主机周期的大部分时间里，迹象都不算乐观，但现在比以往任何时候都更像是XBOX的终点，因为前任领导层做出的许多决定正在被推翻。菲尔·斯宾塞掌舵期间打造了一个制作帝国，旗下工作室为XBOX开辟了大量可探索的方向：这套业务几乎能切入你能想到的任何类型或趋势。但随着多家工作室即将被从组合中抛出，被迫自谋生路，这些方向很快可能被摧毁。

paragraphs.en: Sharma today claims that . And so it all begs the question: Is draining this much talent really the way to cure Xbox?
paragraphs.cn: Sharma今天声称情况需要改变。因此问题也随之而来：流失如此多的人才，真的是治愈XBOX的办法吗？

paragraphs.en: If Xbox wants to focus on big single-player AAA games that have the potential to be both critical and commercial successes, Marvel鈥檚 Blade seems like a relatively sure bet. In development at Arkane 鈥?one of the smartest and most inventive video game studios in the world 鈥?the prospect of this one is incredibly tantalising. The blueprint is there to follow, too. Just look at what IO Interactive recently achieved with 007 First Light; taking the creative stealth systems the studio has honed over decades developing Hitman and translating that into a massively popular established IP in the shape of James Bond. Just imagine what a developer that has crafted the likes of Dishonored, Prey, and Deathloop could bring to the world of Blade, as it, too, blends its own smart stealth systems with the 21st century鈥檚 biggest pop culture universe. With its rivals at PlayStation seeing massive success with Insomniac鈥檚 Spider-Man games (and presumably again with the upcoming Wolverine), this seems like a surefire way to success for Xbox.
paragraphs.cn: 如果XBOX想专注于有潜力同时赢得口碑和商业成功的大型单人AAA游戏，那么漫威刀锋战士看起来是一个相对稳妥的选择。它由Arkane开发，而Arkane是世界上最聪明、最有创造力的游戏工作室之一，这个项目的前景非常诱人。可参考的蓝图也已经存在。看看IO Interactive最近凭《《007 初露锋芒》》做到的事情：它把自己在数十年《杀手》开发中打磨出的创造性潜行系统，转化到詹姆斯·邦德这个极受欢迎的成熟IP上。再想象一下，打造过《耻辱》《掠食》和《死亡循环》的开发者，能为《刀锋战士》的世界带来什么；它同样可以把自身聪明的潜行系统与21世纪最大的流行文化宇宙结合起来。PlayStation的竞争对手已经凭Insomniac的《蜘蛛侠》游戏取得巨大成功，并且大概率会在即将推出的《金刚狼》上再次成功，这对XBOX来说似乎是一条稳妥的成功路径。

paragraphs.en: If the pathway to a healthy Xbox is to make critically acclaimed games that hold the potential to sell millions of copies, then why let Marvel鈥檚 Blade and Arkane go?
paragraphs.cn: 如果让XBOX恢复健康的路径，是制作既能赢得好评、又有潜力卖出数百万份的游戏，那为什么要放走漫威刀锋战士和Arkane？

paragraphs.en: As popular as Marvel is, though, we know you can鈥檛 support an entire video game platform on its shoulders. And so if the plan to return Xbox to good health is to help award-winning studios thrive and fund them in creating industry-leading tech, then another entry into the Hellblade series sounds like a smart move. Both Senua鈥檚 Sacrifice and Senua鈥檚 Saga have won prizes at The Game Awards, BAFTA, and D.I.C.E for their artistry, technology, and the performances behind their stories and characters, as well as educating those who played them in the world of psychosis and mental illness.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，尽管Marvel非常受欢迎，我们也知道不可能靠它一肩撑起整个游戏平台。所以，如果让XBOX恢复健康的计划，是帮助获奖工作室蓬勃发展，并资助它们创造行业领先技术，那么再推出一部《地狱之刃》系列作品听起来就是明智之举。《塞娜的献祭》和《塞娜的传说》都曾在The Game Awards、BAFTA和D.I.C.E获奖，获奖原因包括其艺术表现、技术能力，以及支撑故事和角色的表演，同时也让玩家了解精神病性障碍和心理疾病的世界。

paragraphs.en: If Xbox wants to make impactful games made with world-leading technology that cement Xbox鈥檚 position with awards-recognised releases, then why let Senua and Ninja Theory go?
paragraphs.cn: 如果XBOX想制作由世界领先技术打造、能够产生影响力，并通过获奖作品巩固XBOX地位的游戏，那为什么要放走《塞娜》和Ninja Theory？

paragraphs.en: Perhaps the plan is to nurture online communities and build on the foundations of already established series. Something Xbox, to its credit, did well when turning around Sea of Thieves following its rocky launch (but what the future looks like for its developer Rare, after the cancellation of the long-gestating Everwild, is another question). State of Decay was one of the great Xbox Live Arcade success stories when it launched back in 2013 and became the second-fastest-selling XBLA game of all time. But it鈥檚 now been almost nine years since its sequel saw the light of day, with State of Decay 3 currently set to finally arrive in 2027. Though never critically loved, State of Decay developed a dedicated fanbase that hoped for it to appear at every Xbox showcase across the past decade. To move away from the threequel now, when it actually seems like its development is close to completion, feels like another disaster. Seeing it through would show Xbox fans that this is a platform that remembers what made it the juggernaut it was during the 360 era.
paragraphs.cn: 也许计划是培育线上社区，并建立在已有系列的基础之上。公平地说，XBOX曾经在《盗贼之海》坎坷首发后成功扭转局面，这一点做得不错；不过，在开发商Rare长期开发的《Everwild》被取消后，Rare的未来又是另一个问题。《腐烂国度》2013年推出时，是XBOX Live Arcade最成功的案例之一，并成为XBLA史上销量第二快的游戏。但它的续作问世至今已将近九年，而《腐烂国度3》目前终于定于2027年推出。尽管《腐烂国度》从未广受评论界喜爱，它仍培养出一批忠实粉丝，过去十年里一直期待它出现在每一场XBOX发布会上。现在，当三代作品看起来终于接近完成时转身离开，感觉又是一场灾难。把它做完会向XBOX粉丝证明，这是一个仍记得自己在360时代为何成为庞然大物的平台。

paragraphs.en: If Xbox wants to please the long-term Xbox player base and commit to a series it once helped create, then why let State of Decay 3 and Undead Labs go?
paragraphs.cn: 如果XBOX想取悦长期XBOX玩家，并继续投入一个自己曾帮助创造的系列，那为什么要放走《腐烂国度3》和Undead Labs？

paragraphs.en: Xbox could attempt to continue making the sort of third-person action-adventures that its rival has long found success in. But it now takes PlayStation seven years to make them, a window that could easily be exploited by a smart, nimble studio that thinks outside the box. Funnily enough, Xbox had one of those 鈥?a studio that鈥檚 bounced from puzzle platformer to first-person survival to action-adventure, each set in a world that鈥檚 a far cry from triple-A norms. Xbox鈥檚 lead characters are largely huge men in combat attire fighting gross creatures, and so a hero who explored the mythology of America鈥檚 Deep South didn鈥檛 just provide diversity of representation, but diversity of story, setting, and theme. There are many cultures that have so much to offer video games 鈥?new heroes with different quests, new villains with different motivations, new monsters that pull on unique fears 鈥?and we see them all too rarely. South of Midnight is an excellent example of what can happen when they are shared with all of us.
paragraphs.cn: XBOX可以尝试继续制作竞争对手长期成功的那类第三人称动作冒险游戏。但现在PlayStation制作这类游戏需要七年时间，这样的空档完全可以被一家聪明、敏捷、敢于跳出框架思考的工作室利用。有趣的是，XBOX原本就有这样一家工作室：它从解谜平台游戏跳到第一人称生存游戏，再到动作冒险游戏，每一部作品所处的世界都与AAA常规相距甚远。XBOX的主角大多是身穿战斗装备、与怪物搏斗的高大男性，因此一个探索美国深南部神话的英雄，不只是带来了代表性上的多样性，也带来了故事、场景和主题上的多样性。许多文化都能为电子游戏提供大量内容：带着不同使命的新英雄、拥有不同动机的新反派、触发独特恐惧的新怪物；但我们太少看见它们。《午夜之南》就是一个优秀例子，展示了当这些内容被分享给所有人时，能够发生什么。

paragraphs.en: If Xbox considers fresh approaches to art, lore, and culture to be important to its health, then why choose to stop the artists at Compulsion Games from expressing themselves further by letting them go?
paragraphs.cn: 如果XBOX认为艺术、传说和文化上的新鲜路径对自身健康很重要，那为什么要选择放走Compulsion Games，从而阻止那里的艺术家继续表达自己？

paragraphs.en: What about the smaller, singular experiences that are exactly the sort of thing Game Pass was built for? Ideally, it鈥檚 a place where games you maybe didn鈥檛 even know existed can be found, turning an unexpected discovery into hours and hours of play. Games like Keeper, one of 2025鈥檚 greatest games, and a short, exceptionally creative adventure that sticks out like a lighthouse on the shore of a sea of familiarity. Games like Psychonauts 2, that connect with us on a deeper level, whilst still making us laugh.
paragraphs.cn: 那些规模更小、独特而完整的体验又该怎么办？它们正是Game Pass建立之初最适合承载的东西。理想情况下，它应该是一个让你发现也许原本都不知道存在的游戏的地方，把一次意外发现变成数小时又数小时的游玩。比如《Keeper》，2025年最出色的游戏之一，一段短小却极富创造力的冒险，在熟悉之海岸边像灯塔一样醒目。还有《意航员2》这样的游戏，它在更深层次上与我们产生连接，同时仍然让我们发笑。

paragraphs.en: If these doses of pure joy outside of the triple-A bubble are valued, then why even consider letting a studio like Double Fine go?
paragraphs.cn: 如果AAA泡沫之外这些纯粹快乐的剂量仍有价值，那为什么甚至要考虑放走Double Fine这样的工作室？

paragraphs.en: Or is the idea to try and dominate the hardware space, as the Xbox 360 did back in the late 2000s? The console, the ecosystem it harboured, and, crucially, the cost was an important factor at the time, especially when compared to the disastrous PS3 launch. But it was the 360鈥檚 library of first-party games, and it being the best place to play multiplatform releases, that more than arguably guaranteed its success. When the PS5 is currently winning the fight against the Series X, and is the place where most will be playing the mammoth GTA 6 in the very near future, that battle seems lost already.
paragraphs.cn: 又或者，想法是像2000年代后期的XBOX 360那样，尝试主导硬件领域？那台主机、它承载的生态系统，以及关键的价格，在当时都是重要因素，尤其是在与灾难性的PS3首发相比时。但真正可以说保证其成功的，是360的第一方游戏库，以及它作为游玩多平台游戏最佳平台的地位。当PS5目前正在与XBOX Series的竞争中胜出，并且在不久的将来会成为大多数人游玩庞然大物《GTA6》的地方时，这场战斗似乎已经输了。

paragraphs.en: And if Xbox wants to return to those halcyon hardware days and turn Project Helix into the best console on the market when it launches, then why halt the development of games that could convince people to invest in it? If hardware is the foundation of the plan, then why does Xbox鈥檚 parent company continue to invest in AI via Copilot, and as a result contribute to the current components crisis that is impacting the cost of memory worldwide, and thus directly contribute to ensuring Project Helix arrives with a staggering price tag? It鈥檚 an incredible self-own by Microsoft, but one that鈥檚 impact trickles all the way down to us. Gaming was once an affordable hobby, with the Series S recently being a standard-bearer for such a concept. It all seems like a distant world away today.
paragraphs.cn: 如果XBOX想回到那些硬件的黄金岁月，并在Project Helix推出时把它变成市场上最好的主机，那为什么要叫停那些本可以说服人们为它投入的游戏开发？如果硬件是计划的基础，那为什么XBOX的母公司还要继续通过Copilot投资AI，从而加剧当前影响全球内存成本的零部件危机，并直接导致Project Helix注定会带着惊人的价格标签问世？这对微软来说是一次难以置信的自伤，而它的影响一路传导到我们身上。游戏曾经是一项负担得起的爱好，XBOX Series S最近还曾是这种理念的代表。如今这一切似乎都像是遥远世界里的事。

paragraphs.en: If the plan was to get people on side with short-term wins like changing the colour of a logo and shouting the word 鈥淴BOX鈥?as loud as possible in an effort to be heard by a small section of what remains of a passionate player base, then it hasn鈥檛 worked. That well has now truly dried up, and what鈥檚 left at the bottom is a place to chuck all the mismanaged talent that made the beloved games this brand was once built on. The time for the benefit of the doubt has long gone, I鈥檓 afraid, with confidence in what鈥檚 next for Microsoft鈥檚 gaming at an all-time low.
paragraphs.cn: 如果计划是靠一些短期胜利把人拉到自己这边，比如改变Logo颜色，或者尽可能大声喊出「XBOX」，试图让剩下那小部分热情玩家听见，那么它并没有奏效。那口井现在真的已经干了，而井底剩下的，只是一个用来丢弃那些管理不善下流失的人才的地方；正是这些人才，曾经制作出这个品牌赖以建立的那些受人喜爱的游戏。恐怕，给予怀疑空间的时间早已过去，人们对微软游戏业务下一步的信心也跌至历史低点。

paragraphs.en: So, what now, Xbox? Is the cure to go all-in on a handful of decades-old 鈥渕ega franchises鈥?like Halo, The Elder Scrolls, and Call of Duty? It鈥檚 a big bet. Let鈥檚 see if it pays off.
paragraphs.cn: 那么，XBOX接下来怎么办？解药是全力押注于少数已有数十年历史的「超级系列」，比如《光环》《上古卷轴》和《使命召唤》吗？这是一场豪赌。让我们看看它是否能得到回报。
